notes: v384 — New auto-pilot exit: 🎯 Scale out at target. When a holding reaches your take-profit, the bot can sell part of it (you pick the %), bank that gain, then let the rest run — its stop lifts to break-even and it rides your 🪤 trailing stop. Turn it on in ⚖ My Rules → exits. Off by default on existing accounts; practice money only. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to update.
